_meta.description: Receives raw store input, validates required fields, applies defaults, and produces normalized_intake_payload and project_setup_payload.

required_fields.description: Unique project identifier. Must match pattern ^[a-z0-9-]+$. Used as namespace for all artifacts.
ISO country code of primary market, e.g. DE, US, UK
ISO language code, e.g. de, en, fr
ISO currency code, e.g. EUR, USD, GBP
Enum: single-brand-store | multi-product-store | category-specialist | editorial-commerce-store | general-commerce-store
Enum: budget | mass-market | mass-premium | premium | luxury | to-be-defined
Enum: no-publish | draft-only | draft-and-review. Maps to operating_mode in store-profile.

normalized_fields.default_rule: If absent or empty, defaults to [primary_market]
If absent or empty, defaults to [primary_language]
If absent or empty, defaults to [primary_currency]
If absent, defaults to [] (empty array). Downstream phases treat 0 URLs as archetype mode.
If absent, defaults to null. Optional downstream enrichment.

normalized_intake_payload.description: Normalized and defaulted intake payload forwarded to all downstream planning phases

project_setup_payload.description: Project initialization data used by orchestrator to set up project directory structure (self-hosted only)

validation_errors.description: A required field is absent or empty in the intake input. Lists all missing fields.
A field value is not within its allowed enum. E.g. store_type, price_positioning.
project_id does not match ^[a-z0-9-]+$ pattern. Must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens.

cloud_notes.compatibility: Full cloud compatibility. All normalization and validation runs in-memory.
cloud_notes.no_disk_writes: intake-store-input does not write any files. Output is inline pipeline data only.
